Stories Tagged "Imagined Geography"

A focused archive path for Imagined Geography, collecting 4 related Kyunolab records across 1 shelf.

Lost Worlds

The Railway Atlas With a Missing Capital: Why Imagined Geography Feels Almost Real

An archive reading built around a railway atlas marks a capital city absent from political maps.

Lost Worlds

The Underground City Lit by Reflected Noon: The Maps and Myths Behind a Hidden Realm

An archive reading built around an underground city receives daylight through mirrors no visitor can locate.

Lost Worlds - 11 min read
Lost Worlds

The Moonlit Country in Old School Maps: A Lost World Record

A calm Kyunolab note tracing old school maps show a pale country in the margin where students once drew borders.

Lost Worlds - 9 min read
Lost Worlds

The Station for a Town Removed From Timetables: A Lost Place Record

A calm Kyunolab note tracing a station timetable keeps one platform for a town removed from the route.
